title: Unlock The End
description: Enhances exploration by making you get keys throughout the overworld and nether in order to enter The End and beat Minecraft.
body:
![The title of the project](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92a4b17d496673ad98d6867a3202d6985d71470a.png)

This project makes the end portal sealed with 4 different locks. In order to open the seals, you must visit locations around the overworld and nether to gather 4 unique keys.

The keys and their locations are listed below. **If you want to have a better experience and discover the key locations through exploration, do not view the dropdown!**


<details>
<summary>Key Locations (Spoiler)</summary>

- **Ancient Key:** Found in the generic loot chests of Ancient Cities.
- **Gilded Key:** Found in both generic loot chests and the treasure loot chests (located with the gold blocks and magma spawners) of Bastion Remnants.
- **Woodland Key:** Found in loot chests of Woodland Mansions (not in the empty chests)
- **Ominous Trial Key**: Found by completing an ominous trial spawner in a trial chamber (it is the vanilla key)

</details>

## Demonstration video
You can see a quick trailer of the pack [here.](https://www.reddit.com/r/Minecraft/comments/1maz8l9/i_made_a_datapack_that_locks_the_end_portal)
#
Leave comments about this project on it's [Planet Minecraft Page.](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/unlock-the-end)
